title: Fix race condition in memcached-pod-kill chaos test
summary: Post-external-review metadata update. The diff contains three planwerk tracking files: (1) progress JSON phase transition from awaiting_external_review to improving, (2) a new review pattern capturing the lesson to check sibling files for the same anti-pattern when a PR improves a pattern, and (3) a new external review record documenting berendt's review which found 0 blocking/critical/warning issues and recommended merge without changes. All files follow established project conventions verified against existing siblings.

code_quality_checklist.item: Review pattern file matches established structure (title, Review-Area, Detection-Hint, Severity, Occurrences, What to check, Why it matters, Examples)
External review JSON matches established schema (all required fields present, sequence_number correct)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
No scope creep — only metadata files changed
